meta.description: MiroFish-inspired dating simulation results for 1000 SHELL Mates lobster agents. Each agent was rated by an AI swarm across multiple speed-dating tables. Scores are 1-10 (mapped to int128 on-chain). Categories: hotOrNot (overall), shellGleam, clawGame, antennaRizz, tailFlex, butterBath.
